associated_groups.description: An array of group IDs in which the team account is associated.

is_invitation_id.description: Applicable only for SSO team accounts. If temporary invitation ID is passed as team account ID, then set this to true.

Team Account -Edit associated user group.summary: Here you can add or remove the existing associated groups of the user. To update an SSO user who hasn't logged into the system, you can pass the invitation ID as userId and in the body set is_invitation_id to true.
